description_long: This is a modern countertop microwave oven with a sleek, rectangular form and a predominantly black exterior. The front features a large, glossy door panel with a slightly protruding handle on the right, and a digital control panel with a display and multiple touch buttons. The control panel is vertically aligned and situated to the right of the door, with clear labeling and a digital clock display. The top, sides, and back are solid and unadorned, with subtle venting visible on the lower rear and side surfaces. The overall design is minimalist, with smooth surfaces and sharp edges, giving it a contemporary appearance. The microwave is likely constructed from metal and plastic, with a glass window possibly integrated into the door, though it is not visibly transparent in these views.
description: A sleek, black, rectangular microwave oven with a glossy front door, digital control panel, and minimalist design. The handle and control panel are positioned on the right side of the front face.
description_view_0: The front view shows the large, glossy door, the vertical handle on the right, and the digital control panel with display and buttons.
description_view_1: The right-side view reveals a solid, unadorned surface with a slight protrusion from the handle and possible venting near the bottom.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a plain, flat surface with minimal visible features, possibly a vent near the bottom edge.
description_view_3: The left-side view is similar to the right, with a solid surface and no visible controls or handle.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, light-colored brand logo is visible on the upper section of the control panel, to the right of the door. It is subtle and integrated into the digital display area.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is vertically aligned on the right side of the front face, featuring a digital display at the top and a grid of touch buttons below. The buttons are arranged in several rows and columns, with clear labeling for functions such as time, power, and presets.
attribute_door_handle_design: The door handle is a vertical bar integrated into the right edge of the door, protruding slightly for easy grip. It appears to be made of plastic or metal, matching the overall black color scheme, and is ergonomically shaped for pulling.
attribute_vent_placement: Vents are present on the lower rear and possibly the right side of the microwave, appearing as horizontal slits or grilles for airflow. They are subtle and blend into the surface.
